## Summary

## UI checklist

- [ ] Dark-first UI preserved
- [ ] Chat-first flow preserved
- [ ] No colorful dashboard-heavy UI added
- [ ] Badges are limited and meaningful
- [ ] Action Review is clear for write operations

## Security checklist

- [ ] No frontend OpenAI/Jira/Confluence/MCP direct calls
- [ ] No secrets in frontend code
- [ ] No `.env` committed
- [ ] Write actions require approval
- [ ] Destructive actions blocked

## Quality checklist

- [ ] lint passes
- [ ] typecheck passes
- [ ] tests pass
- [ ] build passes
